summary: Iteration 12: Export enhancement testing for Corrected Light-Induced HRV (Detrended) data. All 81 backend tests pass (including 13 new export-specific tests). Verified PDF export with Light-Induced HRV Analysis page showing both original and detrended tables. Verified XLSX export with 'Light Stim HRV' sheet containing 17 rows: original HRV (rows 1-7) + detrended section (rows 10-17). Frontend UI fully functional with per-stim detrended table and visualization buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF export correctly renders Light-Induced HRV Analysis page with two tables (original cyan, detrended green)
PDF export includes Detrending Visualization page with 5 stim rows, 3 panels each (A: Raw NN₇₀, B: Trend Extraction, C: Detrended Residual)
XLSX export 'Light Stim HRV' sheet has correct structure: original HRV + detrended section below
Detrended section uses green header styling (fill color #059669)
Frontend buildExportData() correctly passes lightHrvDetrended to export endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export enhancement complete. PDF has Light-Induced HRV Analysis page (both tables) and Detrending Visualization page (5 stim × 3 panels). XLSX has 'Light Stim HRV' sheet with original (rows 1-7) and detrended (rows 10-17) sections. Backend accepts light_metrics_detrended field with per_pulse and final keys. Frontend passes detrended data correctly via buildExportData().

features_verified.pdf_export_light_hrv_page: ✅ Contains original HRV table (cyan header) and detrended HRV table (green header)
features_verified.pdf_export_detrending_viz_page: ✅ 5 stim rows with Panel A (Raw), Panel B (Trend), Panel C (Residual)
features_verified.xlsx_original_hrv_section: ✅ Rows 1-7 with ln(RMSSD₇₀), RMSSD₇₀, ln(SDNN₇₀), SDNN₇₀, pNN50₇₀
features_verified.xlsx_detrended_median_row: ✅ Row 17 shows median of detrended values
